name: Peanut Butter Snax
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Multi-colored candy coated, chocolate pieces; M&Ms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwavable bowl, combine peanut butter, butter, and spices.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 1 minute, or until butter melts. Mix well.
3. Pour the peanut butter mixture over popcorn, shredded wheat, and pretzels in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
4. Stir to coat evenly.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking time.
6. Cool the popcorn mixture to room temperature.
7. Stir in candy pieces.
8. Makes 8 cups. Store in an airtight container.
